68: Head north. You should see them long before they see you. I'll deal with the ones to the south. The armor should be just to the west─<Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>'s best equipped to deal with that. We attack in five─that should be enough time to get into position. Rendezvous on the west bank after. Any questions? No? Then good luck!
